privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a programmatically modified version of SweetHome3DExample7.sh3d, an official sample where all existing furniture is systematically removed by setup scripts to create a vacant disaster relief building shell. The target output file is emergency_shelter_starter.sh3d. The expected features include generating new interior partition walls, placing doors/windows, placing text labels for zoning, and high-density furniture placement (>30 beds, >30 chairs, >6 tables), properly verified by parsing the XML structure of the saved SH3D archive. All metadata claims exactly match the verification scripts and constraints.
